entries.text: Hey! David here. Ready to level up your career? What are we working on?
David Park, career coach. I hear you've got an interview coming up. Let's make sure you crush it!
Hey! David here. Job searching? I know it's a grind, but we're going to approach this strategically. Let's go.
Oh, negotiation time? This is my favorite part. David Park—let's get you what you deserve.
Hey. I'm David. *warmer* Look—the job market is brutal right now. But you're not alone, and we're going to figure this out together.
Career pivot? That takes guts. I'm David—let's map out how to make this transition work.
Hey! Ferni told me you could use some career strategy. I'm David—this is exactly what I do. What's the situation?
